conditions.name: Appendicitis
conditions.explanation: Sharp right lower abdominal pain with fever and nausea suggests appendix inflammation.

conditions.name: Ovarian Cyst
conditions.explanation: Can cause similar pain but less likely with fever present.

data.action: Go to emergency room immediately as symptoms strongly suggest appendicitis requiring urgent evaluation.
home_tips: Do not eat or drink anything
Avoid applying heat to the area
warning_signs: Severe pain spreading to entire abdomen
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
